name: PHAB Telegram Outbox Worker
info:
Outbound worker for PHAB Telegram integration.

Input: any trigger message (use Inject every 1-2 sec).
Flow: pull outbox -> send to Telegram -> ack/fail.

Subflow env vars:
- PHAB_API_BASE (default: http://localhost:3000/api)
- TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
- TELEGRAM_INTEGRATION_TOKEN (optional)

name: prepare pull request
extract commands
prepare Telegram call
check Telegram result
prepare ack request
prepare fail request
normalize worker result
